basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Gandhinagar (IIT Gandhinagar) Post-Doctoral Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 09 July 2026 on the official website of IIT Gandhinagar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Psychology, Cognitive Science, Vision Science, Developmental Science/psychology, Developmental Brain Sciences, Neuroscience, or a closely related field. Minimum 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward, and 55% or equivalent grade in classes 10th and 12th. Demonstrated experience designing and running controlled psychophysics experiments with coding experience in MATLAB, Python and JavaScript highly recommended. Strong quantitative background: statistics and data science skills (R and/or Python). Solid grounding in basic neuroscience and cognitive development. Ability to conduct independent and collaborative research and communicate science through manuscripts, reports, and presentations.
qualification.details: Ph.D. in Psychology, Cognitive Science, Vision Science, Developmental Science/psychology, Developmental Brain Sciences, Neuroscience, or a closely related field. Candidates who have submitted their thesis in the aforementioned fields on or before the last date of application submission are encouraged to apply as well. The percentage/grade points with respect to academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward, and 55% or equivalent grade in classes 10th and 12th. Demonstrated experience designing and running controlled psychophysics experiments with coding experience in MATLAB, Python and JavaScript highly recommended. Strong quantitative background: statistics and data science skills (R and/or Python), with the ability to apply methods such as Item Response Theory, confirmatory factor analysis, and hierarchical growth-curve/multilevel modelling. Solid grounding in basic neuroscience and cognitive development. Ability to conduct independent and collaborative research and communicate science through manuscripts, reports, and presentations.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Post-Doctoral Fellow – Psychophysics, Behavioral Assessment building & School-Based Research

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Gandhinagar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Ph.D. in Psychology, Cognitive Science, Vision Science, Developmental Science/psychology, Developmental Brain Sciences, Neuroscience, or a closely related field. Candidates who have submitted their thesis in the aforementioned fields on or before the last date of application submission are encouraged to apply as well. The percentage/grade points with respect to academic qualifications will be a minimum of 60% or equivalent grade from Graduation onward, and 55% or equivalent grade in classes 10th and 12th. Demonstrated experience designing and running controlled psychophysics experiments with coding experience in MATLAB, Python and JavaScript highly recommended. Strong quantitative background: statistics and data science skills (R and/or Python), with the ability to apply methods such as Item Response Theory, confirmatory factor analysis, and hierarchical growth-curve/multilevel modelling. Solid grounding in basic neuroscience and cognitive development. Ability to conduct independent and collaborative research and communicate science through manuscripts, reports, and presentations.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Salary
IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow recruitment is 20th August 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Post-Doctoral Fellow role?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Ph.D. in Psychology, Cognitive Science, Vision Science, Developmental Science/psychology, Developmental Brain Sciences, Neuroscience, or a related field. A minimum of 60% from graduation onwards and 55% in 10th and 12th are also required.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 72,000 to Rs. 84,000.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Post-Doctoral Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Post-Doctoral Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the IIT Gandhinagar Post-Doctoral Fellow recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q7. What are the key skills required for this role?
faq.answer: Key skills include experience in designing and running psychophysics experiments, coding in MATLAB, Python, and JavaScript, strong quantitative skills in statistics and data science, and knowledge of neuroscience and cognitive development.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual position?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position at IIT Gandhinagar.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at IIT Gandhinagar, Gujarat.
